generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement along crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist movement for lifting containers"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers at hoist end"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBTimeSeriesStorage
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBTimeSeriesStorage
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models of physical crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360CADModeling
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPythonModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibPythonModule
]

instance CapellaArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MBSE representation using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaArcadiaMBSE
]

instance DockerContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Containerizes Database (TimescaleDB), MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto), and Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationDashboardService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationValidationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantryLibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Python module for control/logic of physical crane interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationValidationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBTimeSeriesStorage : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for historical logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Data visualization for operator monitoring and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging for real-time state signals between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationValidationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance Fusion360CADModeling : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "CAD modeling for physical crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationValidationService
]

instance CapellaArcadiaMBSE : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) representation using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanInsight
]

instance SimulationValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates trajectory for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorAlertsAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization for operator monitoring and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryTraceVisualization, ConfidenceBoundsInsight
]

instance TrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path plan for container movement"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results confirming trajectory feasibility"
]

instance HistoricalDataAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis and reporting"
]

instance TrajectoryTraceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds (blue/yellow)"
]

instance ConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation confidence bounds displayed in Grafana dashboard"
]

instance OperatorAlertsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers operator alerts when measurement-simulation deviations exceed thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Physical crane structure with frame, two stepper motors, electromagnet, swing angle encoder, anemometer, and Arduino microcontroller for control"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Python application for sensor and actuator interface"
]

instance ControlApplication : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Application managing motor control and electromagnet activation"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Application for historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Operator interface for monitoring and control"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system"
    base:contains TimescaleDBTimeSeriesStorage, GrafanaVisualizationDashboard, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationValidationService, ContinuousValidationService, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance PhysicalSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, PhysicalCraneInterface, ControlApplication, LoggingApplication, HMI
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Trajectory Generator Service and Human Machine Interface are sent through the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to control cart and hoist motors via TMC4671-Eval controllers, and to operate the electromagnet via the Arduino."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with the Continuous Validation Service performing ongoing comparison of executed trajectories against simulations, and the Logging Application recording state data at high frequency for time-series analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based architecture with physical components (crane, controllers, sensors) interacting with digital services via MQTT and TimescaleDB. The Physical Crane Interface bridges physical and digital layers, while the MQTT Broker enables service-to-service communication for trajectory generation, simulation, and validation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with the digital twin continuously monitoring and validating crane performance during real-time operation for fault detection, trajectory optimization, and continuous validation, as evidenced by publications on operational fault localization and continuous validation methods."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time trajectory measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds. Model validation techniques from [5] are reused to ensure simulation fidelity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time signaling between services. TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) for persistent data storage of time-series sensor and control data."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) containerized via Docker with a single docker-compose file. Physical and digital services run on a single personal computer, with gantrylib Python module installed via pip for system control."
]
